overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in white armor exploring a rural Japanese outpost during golden hour. The character walks through tall autumn grass past military tents and NPCs, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching military outpost in autumn grassland

events.description: location text 'MATSUMAE OUTPOST' appears indicating area entry
character moves from tall grass onto dirt path near tents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass toward the outpost

notable_agents.action: enemy warrior in red armor standing near the tent entrance

entered.detail: large canvas tent with wooden poles and fabric walls
stacked wooden crates and barrels near the tent
tall vertical banner with circular clan emblem
stone pillar marker in the grass

segments.scene_description: The samurai approaches a military outpost through tall golden grass under an overcast sky. Snow-capped mountains loom in the background as the character nears canvas tents and supply crates. A warrior in red armor stands guard near the entrance as the location name appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: military outpost with tents and supply caches

events.description: character turns slightly left to navigate around tent structure
exiting the main outpost area into open grassland fields

agents.ego_description: navigating through the outpost past supply crates and wooden barricades

notable_agents.action: warrior standing guard near wooden supply crates

entered.detail: defensive wooden fence structure with pointed stakes
autumn maple tree with bright red foliage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the heart of the outpost, passing wooden barricades and supply caches. A vibrant red maple tree stands out against the golden grass. The samurai navigates around tent structures while NPC warriors stand guard, then exits toward open fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path toward forested mountains

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating golden backlighting on mountains
character begins ascending gentle slope toward rock formation

agents.ego_description: journeying through open grassland toward distant forested mountains

entered.detail: dense pine forest covering the mountain slope
large boulder outcropping beside the path
valley with low-lying fog between mountains

segments.scene_description: Leaving the outpost behind, the samurai travels through expansive grassland dotted with red maple trees. The sun breaks through the overcast sky, casting golden light on the snow-capped mountains ahead. The path leads toward a forested hillside and rocky outcroppings as mist gathers in the distant valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured confines of a military outpost into a vast, sun-drenched wilderness. It begins with the samurai approaching a camp through tall golden grass, moving past canvas tents and supply crates under an overcast sky with snow-capped mountains looming in the distance. As the character navigates through the heart of the outpost, the camera passes wooden barricades and a vibrant red maple tree before exiting the camp toward the open countryside. The scene then expands into expansive grasslands dotted with more red maples, where the sun breaks through the clouds to cast a golden glow over the distant peaks. Finally, the path leads away from the outpost toward a forested hillside and rocky outcroppings as mist begins to gather in the valley below.
